items.title: Serena returns, shrugs off nerves for doubles win
items.summary: After nearly four years away from professional tennis, Serena Williams won her first doubles match with partner Victoria Mboko in the opening round of the HSBC Championship.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Real Madrid anger Atleti with $173M Álvarez bid
items.summary: Real Madrid have entered into a transfer battle with Barcelona after announcing they have had a €150 million ($173m) bid turned down for Atlético Madrid forward Julián Álvarez.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 2026 U.S. Open field: Miles Russell among qualifiers for Shinnecock Hills after Golf's Longest Day
items.summary: After final qualifying on Monday, the U.S. Open field is almost completely set for the 126th playing at Shinnecock Hills
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
